News

Broadmead Road Rebuild- The Government has the funding, now we must secure it

Wednesday, 22 April, 2026
This week, I met Transport Minister, Simon Lightwood, to make my case for a government funded full rebuild of Broadmead Road Bridge. For far too long now, the ongoing closure of Broadmead Road Bridge since July 2023 has caused significant disruption to local residents and businesses. With the Government’s Structures Fund now open, this is a critical opportunity to secure the investment desperately...

3rd April 2026
